name: GAX positioning vs benchmarks
summary: External benchmarks (Scalekit, Anthropic, Cloudflare) motivate the problem; local eval (eval/run_comparison.py) reports separate metrics without a weighted composite. CLI wins median tokens in harness; GAX wins audit-id and structured-envelope rates. Optimized MCP closes much of the token gap but does not standardize per-invoke caps, uniform envelope v1, and sidecar enforcement in one protocol (ACSP). Real LLM proof: examples/agent_runs/SAMPLE_RUN/.
methodology_notes: Phase 1 sources are literature synthesis. Repo eval uses tiktoken, simulated transcripts (eval/session_transcript.py), Pareto winners per axis. No team-chosen composite score. Live MCP optional via --live-mcp.
implications_for_gax: Message: third surface for governed agents; cite external benchmarks for naive MCP economics; cite harness + SAMPLE_RUN for first-party evidence. Planned: ablations, CLI Agent Spec comparison, provider-native token APIs.
corrections_to_repo_docs: research/11 and report.md aligned May 2026 — no composite winner language.
